raw.message: Find out if you can stay sane enough to escape from the asylum.

hook.summary: UGC host poses a direct challenge question to the viewer over gameplay footage.
hook.visual_action: A woman in a picture-in-picture overlay speaks directly to the camera while gameplay of a dark hospital room is shown below.
hook.text_overlay: COULD YOU ESCAPE FROM A MENTAL HOSPITAL?
hook.voiceover_transcript: Could you escape from a mental hospital? I have been...

scene_flow: UGC host introduces the game with a direct challenge to the viewer's problem-solving skills.
Gameplay montage shows various puzzles including a combination lock and hidden object collection.
Host provides a testimonial on why she enjoys the game, highlighting brain training and entertainment value.
Direct call-to-action targeting Android users to download and try the game.
on_screen_text: COULD YOU ESCAPE FROM A MENTAL HOSPITAL?
I HAVE BEEN LOVING THIS GAME CALLED ESCAPE FROM MENTAL HOSPITAL
WHERE YOU NEED TO SOLVE PUZZLING CHALLENGES TO ESCAPE
IT'S SUCH A FUN WAY TO PASS THE TIME
SO IF YOU HAVE AN ANDROID
DEFINITELY RECOMMEND YOU CHECK OUT ESCAPE FROM MENTAL HOSPITAL
cta_text: CHECK OUT ESCAPE FROM MENTAL HOSPITAL
audience_proxy: Casual puzzle game fans on Android looking for brain-training challenges and escape room mechanics.
